200# return «
choose a throne:

Event: The Elven Adventure
Event Date: 21/12/2023
Sage Bot Item Code: E12
Engraving 'Elemental Volley'

Enhancement: 1
Once in a while, fires a fire arrow at a random enemy. The arrow deals 128000 / 160000 / 180000 / 200000 / 225000 / 250000 / 280000 physical damage and sets the target on fire. The burning enemy takes 102400 / 128000 / 144000 / 160000 / 180000 / 200000 / 225000 magic damage and has their healing rate reduced by 50% for 3 sec.

Enhancement: 2
12000 Crit from the gems
Once in a while, fires a fire arrow at a random enemy. The arrow deals 153000 / 192000 / 216000 / 240000 / 270000 / 300000 / 335000 physical damage and sets the target on fire. The burning enemy takes 128000 / 160000 / 180000 / 200000 / 225000 / 250000 / 280000 magic damage and has their healing rate reduced by 50% for 3 sec.
Simultaneously with the fire arrow, the unit fires an ice arrow at a random enemy. The ice arrow deals 153600 / 192000 / 216000 / 240000 / 270000 / 300000 / 335000 magic damage and freezes the target for 2 sec. During this time, the target can't move or attack. It also increases the cooldown time of the target's gear and artifact abilities by 2 sec.

Enhancement: 3
25000 Crit from the gems
Once in a while, fires a fire arrow at a random enemy. The arrow deals 179200 / 224000 / 252000 / 280000 / 315000 / 350000 / 390000 physical damage and sets the target on fire. The burning enemy takes 153600 / 192000 / 216000 / 240000 / 270000 / 300000 / 335000 magic damage and has their heling rate reduced by 50% for 3 sec. Simultaneously with the fire arrow, the unit fires an ice arrow at a random enemy. The ice arrow deals 179200 / 224000 / 252000 / 280000 / 315000 / 350000 / 390000 magic damage and freezes tha target for 2 sec. During this time, the target can't move or attack. It also increases the cooldown time of the target's gear and artifact abilities by 2 sec. Simultaneously with the fire and ice arrows, the unit fires a poison arrow at a random enemy. The poison arrow deals 179200 / 224000 / 252000 / 280000 / 315000 / 350000 / 390000 pure damage and poisons the target. The poisoned enemy takes 153600 / 192000 / 216000 / 240000 / 270000 / 300000 / 335000 magic damage for 3 sec. Their attack speed and damage are reduced by 20% per second.
